title: Create theme context and localStorage persistence
description: React context provides current theme and setTheme. Theme is persisted to localStorage key 'theme'. Hydration-safe init script applies theme before paint.
acceptanceCriteria: cycleTheme advances to next theme and persists to localStorage
Initial theme read from localStorage or defaults to 'daylight'
Init script in root applies theme class before body renders (no flash)

steps.details: Create lib/src/providers/ThemeProvider.tsx. Use React createContext for ThemeId and cycleTheme. State from useState, init from localStorage.getItem('theme') or 'daylight'. Validate stored value is valid ThemeId.
cycleTheme calls getNextTheme, setState, localStorage.setItem('theme', next). Apply theme to document.documentElement via data-theme or class.
In __root.tsx, add inline script (before body) that reads localStorage theme, validates, applies to documentElement. Same pattern as existing THEME_INIT_SCRIPT but for 4 themes.

technicalNotes: Use data-theme attribute for Tailwind variant targeting
Ensure script runs before React hydration
